email.subject: Subject
email.sendFailed: Failed to send email. Please try again.
email.quoteBody:
Dear {{name}},

Please find attached your quote {{reference}}.

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Best regards
email.invoiceBody:
Dear {{name}},

Please find attached your invoice {{reference}}.

Thank you for your business.

Best regards
email.orderBody:
Dear {{name}},

Thank you for your order {{reference}}.

We will process your order shortly.

Best regards
email.deliveryBody:
Dear {{name}},

Your order has been shipped. Delivery reference: {{reference}}.

Best regards
